posts.text:
An amazing job opportunity to lead comms for one of the best products released in years!!


Reem Ateyeh (@reem_a)

I'm hiring someone to join my team at Anthropic to lead Claude Code comms.

This is not a role for someone who wants to run an old playbook. You'll need to be a Claude Code super user, understand developers and dev tools, and have great taste. You'll work hard, learn a lot, and ship with the best people around.

Non-traditional comms paths welcome. My DMs are open!



— https://nitt

What


Sean Hannity 🇺🇸 (@seanhannity)

I love Grok Imagine!! You have to try this. grok.com/imagine

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/seanhannity/status/2034737389227118759#m

This reminds of of that tweet that was like, typing “I’m evil 😈” into a google doc and getting scared


Sen. Bernie Sanders (@SenSanders)

I spoke to Anthropic’s AI agent Claude about AI collecting massive amounts of personal data and how that information is being used to violate our privacy rights.

What an AI agent says about the dangers of AI is shocking and should wake us up.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/SenSanders/status/2034715260259557597#m

There are very serious data and privacy concerns with AI (I report on them). But why are you talking to a hallucinating chatbot about it when there is plenty of actual investigative reporting out there!!

A new "kids online safety" law in Arizona would make posting the South Park clip of Trump and Satan having sex illegal, unless the social media user was able to upload Trump's government ID and a consent form from him allowing them to post the clip. This is censorship in action

Video

HB2133 would require anyone who uploads content that may be "harmful to minors" to obtain govt IDs and consent forms from those depicted. The law would restrict uploading satirical content of politicians and significantly curtail online speech lookoutnews.org/an-arizona-b…

If you want to post this image under Arizona's latest proposed "online safety" law, you'd have to get Putin and Trump's government IDs and consent before posting. The co-sponsor of the bill acknowledged it will be used to restrict satire in the committee hearing.

These media companies also have no understanding of how to work w creators well or navigate the online attention economy. Look at the creator roster at Studio71, Dear Media, or any creator-focused network…. then look at the roster for one of these media companies


Kyle Chayka (@chaykak)

seems like a lot of digital media is becoming "creator collectives" esque! YouTube is the most directly monetizable thing around. But what do you do when the creators are more valuable on their own / leave you.

Because compliance with this law is costly, if this law goes into effect big tech platforms will simply pre-censor any content that could even remotely be deemed by lawmakers as "harmful to minors" aka LGBTQ content, abortion info, South Park clips, and more. www.lookoutnews.org/an-arizona-b...

A new "kids online safety" law in Arizona would make posting the South Park clip of Trump and Satan having sex illegal, unless the social media user was able to upload Trump's government ID and a consent form from him allowing them to post the clip.
It's never about kids safety

But like all of these "online safety" laws, this law has bipartisan support. Democrats are championing it too. It just passed the house with a super majority and has support from the Governor. If you live in Arizona, call your state senator and make your voice heard & fight back nationally!

He's also the one who was responsible for Arizona's online age verification aka ID verification law that passed last year. When that law passed, he boasted that could be used to get trans content removed from the internet.

The Republican sponsor of this bill, a former American Ninja Warrior TV star who got himself elected to state congress, is a far right christian nationalist who's sought to get the pride flag removed from the state capital.

Because compliance with this law is costly, if this law goes into effect big tech platforms will simply pre-censor any content that could even remotely be deemed by lawmakers as "harmful to minors" aka LGBTQ content, abortion info, South Park clips, and more. www.lookoutnews.org/an-arizona-b...

If you want to post an image of Trump and Putin kissing under Arizona's latest proposed "online safety" law, you'd have to get Putin and Trump's government IDs and consent before posting. 

The co-sponsor of the bill acknowledged it will be used to restrict satire in the committee hearing.

HB2133 would require anyone who uploads content that may be "harmful to minors" to obtain govt IDs and consent forms from those depicted. 
 
The law would restrict uploading satirical content of politicians and significantly curtail online speech.

A new "kids online safety" law in Arizona would make posting the South Park clip of Trump and Satan having sex illegal, unless the social media user was able to upload Trump's government ID and a consent form from him allowing them to post the clip.
?????????? www.vanityfair.com/news/story/d...

the point is that if they repeal section 230 there will be nowhere to move!! Sure, there might be some dark web pirating sites that refuse to do any moderation so they're overrun with gore etc, but the rest of the entire internet and every platform will have to pre-screen content

The clout apocalypse, YouTube face, Meghan and Harry’s Netflix fallout, MOG World Order, CEO moats, sync music, the debate over influencers on the red carpet, secret billionaire typing patterns, and more!! Subscribe to my newsletter to support my work 👇🏻
FBI is buying location data to track US citizens, director confirms
For my newsletter, I wrote about all the ways @katmabu.bsky.social's campaign challenged the conventional thinking about modern campaigning: www.burnsnotice.com/kat-abughaza...
77% of women over age 50 no longer worry about what others think of them.

I also have a Kofi if people just want to donate to support my work! Or they can always venmo me at taylorlorenz if they want to just donate and not have platforms take any fees. It's not a perfect system! ko-fi.com/taylorlorenz

The issue sadly is that then ppl who would pay $10 end up paying lower, Patreon is tough. I have an $8/mo or $80 a year option on Substack, which comes out to about $6.60 per month. You get basically the same thing as the Patreon except full livestream VODs, which I might end up putting on there too

Wikipedia has been clear that they benefit from S230. 

www.eff.org/issues/cda23...

How Epstein Warped the Entire Internet. Mr. Beast Islam, Roblox threesoms, the Staples Baddie, Parisian slop bowls, phone away from phone, AI pervert glasses, TX primary influencer wars, and prediction markets' billionaire founders feud

'Situation Monitoring' Products Are Flooding The Web. + Yapper ads, the Most Evil Gay Guy, pop culture OpenClaw, Gucci runway texts, Jim Carry conspiracies, #sendBaron, Zuck's $170M mansion, Opensource Palantir, and how the AIs kill

ICE’s Plan to Monitor Social Media 24/7. + PewDiePieAI, sustainable abundance, MAGA influencers go solar, disappearing summer break, YT's newest teen sensation, giving birth on livestream, a plan to bathe entire cities in sunlight from space

Why The Internet Is Broken. + Ai;dr, r/lanadelrey drama, total boomer luxury communism, American Girl novels, Benny Blanco livestreamer, Nicki Minaj bot farms, Slxughter, POLITICO's pink slime, and a YouTuber's fake ICE tip line

Dumbphone Owners Have Lost Their Minds. + Burnout feminism, slop surgery, sleepcations, serftok, Meta's celeb wrangler -> OpenAI, American Girl Ozempic, chatbot cafes, Tinder voting, 13 yr old skincare CEO, how crying girls will make u rich

They're Trying To Kill The Internet As We Know It . + Beast Banking, Clav's mogshot, a brainrot Reels slam poet, X's fake cancer cure problem, Polymarket Portal feet pics, AI Netflix, analog YouTube, Roblox ICE raids, and giving birth on Discord

The Rise and Fall of Livestream Fail. + Moltbook mania, Minecraft protests, wellness anarchists, travelscrimping, GlamBOT controversy, Tinder for clankers, French Zohran, and escaping a Chinese Mafia crypto slavery scheme

Can You Sue For Social Media Addiction?. + Slopagandists, WannaBeasts, r/massivecock vs ICE, America's Kill Line, peptide pushers, Boy Throb, viral armpitting, a new class of pro-Democrat dark money creators, and is Josh the new Karen?

Why Conservatives Hate Brooklyn Beckham. A Dramageddon drag show, ManyVids AI psychosis, the far right's new goth girl, 13 yr old AI founders, UpScrolled > TikTok, Rumble Shorts, IRL Heated Rivalry, and Tay Zonday takes on ICE.

The New Satanic Panic Is Here. + Admin nights, Steal A Brainrot, GAP's AI orb, IG for fishing, influencer peptides, a16z's pro-AI creator class, and one man's journey from foreign correspondent to Uber driver in Trump’s America

2016 Nostalgia Slop Is Taking Over. + Contentmaxxing, soft eugenics, Heated Rivarly lookalikes, a Reddit mod meltdown, AI relationship dealbreakers, IG's force friendship, Pentagon Pokémon, & how dumb phone owners have lost their minds

Ashley St Clair on trans rights, immigration, Elon and more. + Liquid content, choppelgangers, influencer lobbying, YouTube's vibecession, a $2,500 viral fleece, Gen Z's it vacation spot, China’s hottest app, the Diary of a CEO red pill pipeline, and Nigel Fara

How ICE Makes Raids Go Viral. + Life under a Clicktatorship, shopaganda, OnlyFans visas, 365 button breakdown, the White House press briefing polymarket bets, NYTV.live, and the wildest products at CES this year
We need to stop using industry-friendly PR terms like “age verification” and call it what it is: Digital ID
F*** Jeff Bezos fr

I asked Twitch CEO Dan Clancy about @emiru getting assaulted at Twitchcon and whether creators can trust the platform to keep them safe. Full interview will be out on my YouTube channel/podcast feed on Wednesday
Use my code Taylor20 at JoinDeleteMe.com/Taylor20 for 20% off. Protect yourself today and sign up for @DeleteMe!!!  #sponsored
#stitch with @Auntkaren0 Good Trouble is a pathological liar and it’s so cathartic to see other people recognize what a grifter this man is.
Not a single correction!!!!! 😌
I have never received dark money and here is the proof. Stop falling for ChatGPT misinformation!!!

#stitch with @Lisandra Vazquez Chorus is a project of the Sixteen Thirty Fund, a Democrat dark money group. Just because they updated their website today to try to muddy the waters doesn’t change that. These influencers accepted money from a Democratic dark money find and failed to disclose it. That’s a problem!

#stitch with @Amanda Nelson ZERO money for the non partisan non political reporting program I’m in is from 1630. ZERO. The Omidiyar network is NOT A DARK MONEY GROUP. I have always disclosed my funding. I have never taken dark money. These creators have not disclosed funding and have taken dark money.

#stitch with @GoodTrouble you are flat out lying. ZERO dollars in the journalism fellowship I’m in are from 1630. ZERO DOLLARS. You’re taking a screenshot to a donation to a totally different organization in the Omidiyar Network from years ago and lying to people because your stupid followers can’t fact check basic information.
